_note: CAPCO-2016 §H.6 p120 — 'If the TFNI marking is contained in any portion of a document that contains portions of RD and/or FRD, the RD or FRD takes precedence.' Per p120 commingling clause (p120→p121): 'If TFNI is commingled with RD or FRD within a portion, the RD or FRD takes precedence and "RD" or "FRD," as appropriate, is annotated in the portion mark.' Fires E070 frd-tfni-precedence anchored on the dominated TFNI token (issue #661 wired span + severity through the engine bridge — pre-fix the predicate fired but `bridge_constraint_diagnostic` silently dropped the ConstraintViolation because span/severity were both None). Issue #677: NOFORN (banner form) appears in the portion's dissem block; canonical portion form is NF (§C.1 p25). Two diagnostics expected — orthogonal defects.
